goal: tools/wordfreq.py prints the top-N word frequencies of a text file, with passing pytest tests

criteria.statement: wordfreq.py runs on a sample file and prints the top-5 words with counts, most frequent first, exit code 0
criteria.verify: python tools/wordfreq.py tools/tests/sample.txt 5; check exit code is 0 and output is 5 lines of 'word count' sorted by descending count, ties alphabetical, consistent with the actual content of sample.txt
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C1 — 'the 6 / fox 5 / dog 4 / bird 3 / cat 3', exit 0, independently recounted by verifier

criteria.statement: pytest suite passes with at least 3 tests collected
criteria.verify: python -m pytest tools/tests/ -q; check exit code 0 and >=3 tests passed
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C2 — '8 passed in 0.25s', exit 0, --collect-only confirmed 8 real tests

criteria.statement: empty input file produces no output and exit code 0 (no traceback)
criteria.verify: create nothing: run python tools/wordfreq.py tools/tests/empty.txt 5 (empty.txt must exist in the repo, zero bytes); check exit code 0, empty stdout, no traceback on stderr
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C3 — exit 0, stdout 0 bytes, stderr empty, empty.txt verified zero bytes

criteria.statement: case-insensitivity: 'The' and 'the' count as one word
criteria.verify: python -c "import subprocess; out=subprocess.run(['python','tools/wordfreq.py','tools/tests/sample.txt','50'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.lower().split(); words=out[::2]; assert len(words)==len(set(words)), 'duplicate case-variant words'" plus confirm sample.txt actually contains mixed-case duplicates of at least one word
criteria.evidence: reports/iter-1.json C4 — assertion passed; sample.txt proven to contain mixed-case duplicates for 5 words (non-vacuous test)

banned_outcomes.verify: grep wordfreq.py and tests for socket/urllib/requests/http imports — none may appear

banned_outcomes.statement: criteria.json was modified by the maker
banned_outcomes.verify: git diff goals/2026-07-07-wordfreq/criteria.json must be empty
